response.justification: Despite extensive experience, Bogdan is overqualified and misaligned with the junior/mid-level role; his senior titles, deep expertise in DLang and embedded systems, and lack of PostgreSQL/React/Nest.js focus contradict the job's stack and scope, while his basic German and high seniority raise red flags for team integration and role fit.
strengths: Strong TypeScript and full-stack experience across multiple frameworks
Proven ability to build scalable systems and integrate diverse data sources
Active open-source contributions and clear passion for clean architecture
concerns: Overqualified with senior titles, likely to be dissatisfied in junior role
Lacks demonstrated experience with required stack (PostgreSQL, Nest.js, React)
Basic German proficiency conflicts with high on-site requirement in Berlin
